arts.ttl: I left Arsenal because I wanted to join a team that 'knew how to win'
arts.sum: "Manchester United breathe football and if you look at all the players, the stadium and the manager, my choice was made very soon in my mind if you were basing it on those two clubs . Van Persie's decision paid dividends as he clinched the Premier League title in his first season under Sir Alex Ferguson, eight years after his last trophy win with the Gunners – the FA Cup in 2005.
